editMovementModal.title: Okukyusa entambula ya yinvensulo
editMovementModal.inWarning1: • Eno nkolagana ya kwongera - okukyusa obungi kijja kukosa yinvensulo eriwo kati
editMovementModal.inWarning2: • Okwongera ku bungi = okweyongera mu bintu Okukendeeza ku bungi = okukendeeza ku bintu
editMovementModal.inWarning3: • Okutereeza bbeeyi kijja kukosa okubala kwa FIFO ku nkolagana eziddako
editMovementModal.outWarning1: • Eno nkolagana ya discount - okukyusa mu bungi kijja kukosa inventory eriwo kati
editMovementModal.outWarning2: • Okwongera ku bungi = okukendeeza ku yinvensulo okusingawo | Okukendeeza ku bungi = okwongera ku yinvensulo
editMovementModal.outWarning3: • Bbeeyi ebalwa mu ngeri ya otomatiki nga tukozesa enkola ya FIFO okuva ku nsasula ezisinga obukadde
editMovementModal.adjustmentWarning1: • Eno nkola ya kulongoosa - okutereeza obungi kijja kutereeza yinvensulo okutuuka ku muwendo omupya
editMovementModal.adjustmentWarning2: • Omuwendo omupya gujja kudda mu kifo ky’ebintu ebiriwo kati mu kiseera kino
